hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
if [ -f package.json ]; then npm test --silent 2>/dev/null | tail -5; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m pytest -q --tb=short 2>/dev/null | tail -10; fi; exit 0

/bin/bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf /|git reset --hard HEAD~|DROP DATABASE|truncate.*--no-confirm"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected. Confirm with human first." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

/bin/bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.pem$|\.key$|id_rsa|secrets"; then echo "WARNING: Writing to sensitive file: $FILE — double-check this is intentional." >&2; fi; exit 0'

/bin/bash -c 'if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then git add -A 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then git commit -m "chore(ai): checkpoint $(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0'

/bin/bash -c 'echo "=== CC-STEROIDS SESSION START ==="; if [ -f task_plan.md ]; then echo "📋 task_plan.md exists — read it first"; fi; if [ -f findings.md ]; then echo "🔍 findings.md exists — check for context"; fi; echo "✅ Hooks active: auto-format, test-runner, safety-guard, auto-commit"; exit 0'
